case_title: ALEXIS SALVATIERRA-FLORES VS. MATTHEW OLIVER MORA DIMABUYU

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,150.47 FILED BY SALVATIERRA-FLORES, ALEXIS AS TO DEFENDANT MORA DIMABUYU, MATTHEW OLIVER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALVATIERRA-FLORES, ALEXIS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ALEXIS SALVATIERRA-FLORES. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT MATTHEW OLIVER MORA DIMABUYU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
